customCommands.name: test
customCommands.prompt: Write a comprehensive set of unit tests for the highlighted code. Use the same testing framework as the rest of the codebase and maintain existing patterns.

customCommands.name: docs
customCommands.prompt: Write comprehensive documentation for the highlighted code. Include docstrings, parameter descriptions, return values, and usage examples.

customCommands.name: fix
customCommands.prompt: Analyze the highlighted code for bugs and issues. Explain what's wrong and provide a corrected version.

customCommands.name: optimize
customCommands.prompt: Optimize the highlighted code for better performance and readability. Explain your changes.

customCommands.name: refactor
customCommands.prompt: Refactor the highlighted code to improve readability, maintainability, and follow best practices. Explain the changes.

customCommands.name: explain
customCommands.prompt: Provide a detailed explanation of what the highlighted code does, including any algorithms, patterns, or important details.
